youtube_shorts.title: How to Spot a Rug Pull
youtube_shorts.loop_hook_strategy: Seamless loop: End with 'before you' leading into the start.

scene_by_scene_script.visual: Red flashing warning light over a falling chart.
scene_by_scene_script.voiceover: Stop getting wrecked by rug pulls before you buy.

scene_by_scene_script.visual: Screen recording of a smart contract audit tool.
scene_by_scene_script.voiceover: Always verify if the liquidity is locked by a reputable locker.

scene_by_scene_script.visual: Point to link in bio animation.
scene_by_scene_script.voiceover: Follow for more ways to keep your bags safe.

youtube_shorts.loop_hook_strategy: Connect 'the secret is' at end to 'how I did it' at start.

scene_by_scene_script.voiceover: I turned five hundred into forty thousand using this memecoin strategy.

scene_by_scene_script.voiceover: Grab my free memecoin checklist in the bio now.
